innovation_1.name: 三层角信号分解模型与几何特征材质解耦
innovation_1.contribution_statement: We identify that traditional Light Field EPI hypotheses fail in complex scenes due to undefined physical boundaries, and we systematically define these limits.

innovation_2.name: 基于双掩码与几何路由的混合场景深度估计架构
innovation_2.contribution_statement: We propose a three-layer angular signal decomposition model to fundamentally decouple geometric features from material properties.

innovation_3.name: 光场EPI假设失效的根因分析与物理边界系统性界定
innovation_3.contribution_statement: We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach through a novel dual-mask and geometry-routing architecture that significantly improves depth estimation in mixed scenes.
